creator: jlduran@FreeBSD.org
text:
My question in bug #274865 was if it would be feasible to add:

    git symbolic-ref refs/heads/quarterly refs/heads/<QUARTERLY_BRANCH_NAME>
    git symbolic-ref refs/heads/latest refs/heads/main

So "quarterly" always points to the latest quarterly branch and "latest" is just an alias for "main" in order to match the syntax of pkg.conf(5) (url).
